How Does the Reyada Portal Works?

The Reyada Portal is the primary digital gateway developed by Qatar Development Bank to centralize all enterprise development services. Whether you are launching a new idea or scaling your venture, the Reyada Portal serves as your strategic partner, connecting you to a comprehensive marketplace of specialized advisory, world-class training, and innovative resources designed for sustainable growth. Here's how it works:

Step 1

Explore our Services

Browse through our comprehensive catalog of services and service providers.

Step 2

Create your Profile

Create your personal account by providing the necessary details, and register your company.

Step 3

Perform self assessment

Complete our comprehensive assessment. This will help us understand your specific requirements and tailor our services to meet your needs effectively.

Step 4

Connect & Grow

After receiving tailored service recommendations. You submit your budget, start and end dates, and desired service type to connect with matched providers.

Featured Service Providers

Moore JFC Group LLC

AnnualMergersFranchise

Moore JFC operates as a single firm across the entire GCC region and several African countries. Established in 1978, JFC Group has been serving clients globally for over four decades. As a premium member firm of Moore Global (www.moore-global.com), JFC Group is recognized as one of the leading professional services firms in the region. We offer a comprehensive range of services across Assurance, Advisory, Tax, Consulting, Technology, and Industrial Engineering. For a detailed overview of our service offerings and capabilities, please refer to our capability statement available at the following link: https://fliphtml5.com/bookcase/fopl/

ENABLE TECH LLC

Digital

Enable Tech is an end-to-end customer engagement & commerce platform that helps brands sell, engage, and retain customers across digital channels. Services: 1) Omnichannel Ordering & Commerce Sell through WhatsApp, web, app, call center, and in-store — all connected in one flow. 2) Loyalty & Retention Solutions Points, tiers, cashback, stamps, coupons, and wallet passes designed to drive repeat visits. 3) Customer Engagement & Automation WhatsApp Business API, chatbots, campaigns, notifications, and post-purchase journeys. 4) Order & Operations Management Centralized order hub, branch assignment, driver coordination, and real-time tracking. 5) Analytics & Insights Sales, customer behavior, retention, and performance dashboards to guide decisions.

Morison Menon Chartered Accountants & Partners LLC

GRCAccountingCost

Morison Menon Chartered Accountants & Partners LLC (MMCA), was incorporated in 2007 under Qatar Financial Centre (QFC), Doha, Qatar. The firm is licensed to provide professional services including Audit, Accounting, QFC compliance services and other consultancy services in the State of Qatar. MMCA is the second audit firm licensed by QFC, and the first approved firm to provide audit and consultancy together.
